creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
edwin       2008-06-01 00:52:10 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
    devel/subversion-devel Makefile distinfo pkg-deinstall 
                           pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    devel/subversion-devel/files patch-contrib--client-side--asvn 
                                 svnserve.in svnserve.wrapper 
  Log:
  subversion-devel and subversion-freebsd ports required
  
      For the upcoming migration of the FreeBSD src repository from
      CVS to subversion, we need two ports to be created: subversion-devel
      -> this port will track subversion 1.5, until it is released
      -> according the to the subversion developers, we cannot make
      pre-release versions of subversion part of any official
      distributions: http://svn.haxx.se/dev/archive-2008-05/1096.shtml
      but, we need to get something going for people to use and test
      the new FreeBSD svn repository -> should use www/serf port if
      possible see PR 124059
  
      subversion-freesbd -> this will be based on subversion-devel,
      but with have some private patches from Peter Wemm available
      at: http://people.freebsd.org/~peter/
  
  PR:             ports/124060
  Submitted by:   Craig Rodrigues <rodrigc@crodrigues.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3075    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.121     +25 -128   ports/devel/subversion-devel/Makefile
  1.55      +3 -9      ports/devel/subversion-devel/distinfo
  1.3       +227 -267  ports/devel/subversion-devel/files/patch-contrib--client-side--asvn
  1.2       +12 -10    ports/devel/subversion-devel/files/svnserve.in
  1.3       +1 -1      ports/devel/subversion-devel/files/svnserve.wrapper
  1.4       +1 -1      ports/devel/subversion-devel/pkg-deinstall
  1.4       +4 -0      ports/devel/subversion-devel/pkg-descr
  1.39      +78 -45    ports/devel/subversion-devel/pkg-plist
